title: Create an item when status of subitem changes
excerpt:
I really need this automation:  when the status of a subitem changes to something, create an item in a new board & connect boards. 
Is there a workaround to make this happen today?

posts.author: Michelle4321 (Michelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
